### ripr gap: missing boundary assertion

Changed behavior:
`amount == updated_threshold`

Why this matters:
A related test reaches this code, but no equality-boundary assertion was found.

Repair route:
add boundary assertion

Repair:
Add one focused boundary assertion for `amount == updated_threshold`.

Verify:
`ripr agent verify`

limits_note: Advisory inline-comment publish plan only; default workflows do not post comments, summary-only guidance is never published inline, and gate decisions remain separate.
